name: You're a Mean One, Ms. Zeena... (Sonic Lost World)
description:
Art by Jinusenpai

"Hooray! It's snowing! And what better way to enjoy the snow is to make the best snowman ever! Only problem is that a zeti that goes by the name of Zeena had to ruin your fun."

Creator notes: Hey, This is DonkBonk here, Thanksgiving and Christmas is around the corner, So why not make a winter themed roleplay with Zeena from that one game from 2013, "Sonic Lost World".

Anyways, Peace out y'all!

creator: BonkSpiegel
